ESTIMATED THICKNESSES

Thickness of film 1 = 170.00 nm

Inflexion point of the absorption coefficient of film 1 = 900.00 nm

TRANSMITTANCE WITH THE ESTIMATED THICKNESSES AND OPTICAL PARAMETERS

lambda                     t
4.00000000000000000000e+02 8.16150761008709202393e-01
4.03092783505154613977e+02 8.11045038576003629593e-01
